channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytip on Trenholme Road, 16th March
item.description:
There is some flytipped materials on the greenspace next to this road. There is an old bed frame, some old carpet, some full bin bags, and a large cardboard box.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Trenholme Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside tenants window, 16th March
item.description:
Scooter parked outside tenants windows causing noise/lights and pollution issues Courtyard of Townsend House, Strathnairn Street SE1 5BU

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Strathnairn Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin bags with rubble and rubbish, 16th March
item.description:
Several black bags with rubble plus a hackney council sweepers bag. On pavement near first lamppost in Norcott Road close to Evering Road. Been there months.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Evering Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle at entrance to Felix Manor, Old Perry street, 16th March
item.description:
This car has been here for 3 weeks , also next to it in the hedgerow are dumped 3 fire extinguishers , although I don’t know for sure if the two things are connected in any way?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wry large and deep pothole., 16th March
item.description:
Pothole still not repaired.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickhurst Green, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on Pavement, 16th March
item.description:
Litter been there for over 2 weeks now.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Elmfield Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass area, under trees, 16th March
item.description:
Filthy area which has been covered in litter for a very long time and needs to be resolved as it is an eyesore
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Christchurch Avenue, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing litter bins, 16th March
item.description:
Once again all three litter bins at both bus stops either side of Southend Road near junction of The Avenue and Copers Cope Road are full and overflowing
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southend Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large mattress blocking pavement and building entrance, 16th March
item.description:
The mattress has been here for over a week, I believe this to be something the bin collection cannot take as this is a mattress.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 94, Alscot Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Full litter bin, 16th March
item.description:
Litter bin full
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brackley Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Paint Spillage in middle of alleyway, 16th March
item.description:
A tin of white paint has been spilled with the broken pot of paint left in the alley. There is also a lot of dog poo to be cleared up as dog owners can not be bothered to clear it up themselves.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mount Drive, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Test please ignore, 16th March
item.description:
Test please ignore
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 53, Chalk Farm Road, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Bag full of gas canisters and cardboard box in the alley, 16th March
item.description:
This was dumped over a week ago, just after the alley had been cleaned.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22A, Kedleston Drive, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lens/cover hanging, 16th March
item.description:
The streetlight cover lens is hanging down and appears loose. This could pose a risk to pedestrians or passing vehicles if it falls, as it may cause injury or damage. It would be advisable to have this inspected and secured as soon as possible.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): The Ridgeway, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked visibility, 16th March
item.description:
Hedge overhanging bridge.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ivy Bridge, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 16th March
item.description:
In car spot
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wendover Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on the road, 16th March
item.description:
Bag of rubbish on the lovel avenue road. Bag open and rubbish all over the place

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lovel Avenue, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Storage unit built along emergency access, 16th March
item.description:
Has been reported several times over the years - still there?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Garnham Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two filthy mattresses dumped on pavement at Stockwell Park Rd end of Groveway., 16th March
item.description:
These have been here for several days

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Groveway, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This vehicle was parked on the public pavement from when I first drove past at 9 am 16/03/2026 until I returned past at 10 am 16/03/2026, 16th March
item.description:
As a taxpayer, I do not appreciate vehicles being left on the public pavements that we all contribute towards just so someone can avoid paying for their parking as all of us citizens have to do. As well as it be annoying, it is an obstruction to members of the public in your borough.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Upper Wickham Lane, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
